questionHtml: Deduce, with a reason, whether the concentrations of cotinine and NNAL-Gluc would be higher in the urine or in the blood plasma of a smoker.
markschemeHtml:
higher in urine due to concentration of waste products «during the process of urine production»
OR
higher in urine because water is reabsorbed «from glomerular filtrate/in the collecting duct»/ because «waste products» are not reabsorbed ✔

meta.title: Deduce, with a reason, whether the concentrations of cotinine and NNAL-Gluc would be higher in the urine or in the blood plasma of a smoker.
